meta.label: condition
meta.content: Wear, repair, or operational state of an entity. Orthogonal to identity, location, and ownership.

state.description: new | good | fair | worn | damaged | broken | operational | non-operational | derelict

since.description: ISO date the entity entered this state

_provenance.rationale: Promoted from artifact.condition; condition is universal across vessels, equipment, buildings, animals, content.
